bird.name: 普氏秧鸡
bird.summary: The snoring rail (Aramidopsis plateni), also known as the Celebes rail or Platen's rail, is a large flightless rail and the only member of…

relations.subject: 普氏秧鸡
relations.evidence: Although protected under Indonesian law since 1972, the rail is threatened by habitat loss (even within nature reserves), hunting for food and predation by introduced species; it is therefore evaluated as vulnerable on the IUCN Red List
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。
